name: Shrimp with Snow Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons Rice wine, or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp.
2. Rinse and pat the shrimp dry with a paper towel.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the marinade ingredients.
4. Add the shrimp; mix well. Let stand for 30 minutes.
5. Pat the shrimp dry with a paper towel.
6. In a small bowl, combine the seasoning sauce ingredients; mix well.
7. Heat oil in a wok for 30 seconds over high heat.
8. Stir-fry garlic until golden; about 30 seconds.
9. Add the shrimp and stir-fry for about 30 seconds until they are pink.
10. Remove the shrimp with a slotted spoon, draining well.
11. Add salt and snow peas to the oil in the wok. Stir-fry over high heat for about 30 seconds.
12. Add the seasoning sauce. Stir-fry until the sauce thickens slightly.
13. Add the cooked shrimp. Stir-fry to coat the shrimp with the sauce.
